title: SSA OIG Audit 072309 — Staffing, Productivity, and Processing Times at State DDS (FY2019–FY2023)
description: Full text (markdown) of SSA Office of the Inspector General audit report 072309, 'Staffing, Productivity, and Processing Times at State Disability Determination Services,' dated July 18, 2025. Objective: determine the extent to which DDS staffing, productivity, and processing times changed from FY2019 through FY2023. Contains the audit summary, findings, supporting tables, and recommendations on national and per-state DDS staffing and performance.
geographic_coverage: United States (national, with state DDS detail)

source.publisher: U.S. Social Security Administration, Office of the Inspector General
source.title: Staffing, Productivity, and Processing Times at State Disability Determination Services (Audit Report 072309)

notes: Authoritative: verbatim text of an official, published SSA OIG audit report (number 072309, July 2025). Delivered as markdown extracted from the published PDF; the document is narrative/tabular prose rather than a tidy machine table, so no per-column schema is given. Source URL is the OIG report's canonical landing page (the audit number 072309 is from the document itself); the specific deep-link path is inferred from SSA OIG's standard report URL scheme — confirm against oig.ssa.gov if exactness matters.
